race.comment: The feature of the day and OPPORTUNISTIC (5) gets the nod. He showed he was back in for two back before finishing well off a slow tempo at Belmont last start when backed off the map. Pike sticks with him today though and and getting out in trip is a big tick. He can return to winning ways. HOBA WEST (7) faded a touch third-up at Belmont, but he has been known to do that through his career. Can bounce back today and he'll be able to dictate from the front again. Sure to give a bold sight. DIAMOND SCENE (3) is improving nicely into the campaign and now Fiore hops on board. Can follow the speed across to land in a handy position and he can't be discounted on the back of a strong last start effort. GINGER BAKER (4) won this race last year and looks to get similar conditions today. Parnham hops back aboard having won 8 times aboard. Keep him on side. IN GOOD ORDER (1) can't be discounted getting out in trip again.
